PCNDto.DescriptionOfChange: Vishay Diodes Division is introducing an additional in-house back-end manufacturing site for Commercial Grade Standard and Ultrafast products in SMA package (Case Outline: DO-214AC).

In addition to the current existing final test location in Tianjin, China, Vishay Diodes Division would like to introduce an additional final test location in Shandong, China for SMA/B packaged rectifiers commercial grade P/Ns.
MCB Industrie has been acquired by Vishay.
HiRel Systems has been acquired by Vishay.

In addition to the current existing barrel plating lines and final testing location in Tianjin, China. Vishay Diodes Division would like to introduce a new strip plating line in Tianjin facility, as well as an additional final testing location in its subcontractor in Shanghai, China for SMA packaged rectifiers commercial grade P/Ns.
Powertron GmbH has been acquired by Vishay.
Vishay General Semiconductor announce the addition of two new epitaxial wafer suppliers for their Schottky and Ultrafast recovery rectifier products.
Vishay General Semiconductor would remove the factory code A from the device marking of all SMA/SMB/SMC/SMP/SMPC packaged products.
Discontinuation of  LF Suffix for Part Numbers with Lead-free Plating, Lead free parts and Replacments parts provided
Assembly Process/Structure  Leadframe Design
Vishay acquires Phoenix Passive Components
Siliconix Inc has been acquired by Vishay.
HiRel Systems acquires ZMAN Magnetics
Central Resistor has been acquired by Vishay.
HiRel Systems acquires DT Magnetics International
BCcomponents International Has Been Acquired By Vishay.
General Semiconductor Has Been Acquired By Vishay.
Spectrol Electronics Corp has been acquired by Vishay.
Cera-Mite Corp has been Acquired By Vishay.
Electro-Films Inc has been acquired by Vishay.
Milwaukee Resistor Corporation has been acquired by Vishay.
Mills Resistor Company has been acquired by Vishay.
Roederstein has been acquired by Vishay.
Sprague Technologies has been acquired by Vishay.
Sfernice has been acquired by Vishay.
Bradford Electronics has been acquired by Vishay.
Draloric Electronic has been acquired by Vishay.
Dale Electronics has been Acquired by Vishay.

GidepData.GIDEPDescription: Vishay Product Group, Diodes Division, is issuing this notification to announce an additional final test location in Shandong, China for SMA/B packaged rectifiers commercial grade P/Ns. Reason for Change: Capacity expansion to support customer demand requirement and to improve delivery service.
GidepData.DocumentNumber: Please Contact GIDEP for Document # EB7-C-16-0050

GidepData.GIDEPDescription: Vishay Product Group, Diodes Division, is issuing this notification to announce that in addition to the current existing barrel plating lines and final testing location in Tianjin, China. Vishay Diodes Division would like to introduce a new strip plating line in Tianjin facility, as well as an additional final testing location in its subcontractor in Shanghai, China for SMA packaged rectifiers commercial grade P/Ns.
GidepData.DocumentNumber: Please Contact GIDEP for Document # EB7-C-11-0088

RiskData.YeolComment: The part has surpassed a significant portion of its expected lifespan
